description: A scheduled post has failed because its associated media file was accidentally deleted. Fix the issue by restoring the media file from '/home/ga/Documents/CampaignAssets/summer_sale_promo.jpg' to the Socioboard media directory at '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/publish/public/media/' with necessary read permissions. Additionally, update the status of the failed post (description containing 'Summer Sale') in the 'scheduled_informations' collection of the local MongoDB 'socioboard' database from 6 to 0 to enable a retry.

metadata.expected_text: Huge Summer Sale! Get 50% off all items.
